text: How to sharpen a knife without sharpening
Hi guys, I'm Max from Milky Road and today I'm going to tell you how to sharpen a knife without sharpening.
So guys, before you buy your $30 worth sharpener, watch this.
So I've got a very blunt knife. I want to slice a tomato.
And it's really not going well. So what I'm doing is take any porcelain plate, turn it over.
If you watch here, when porcelain plates are glazed, its base usually remains unglazed and rough.
This is what we're going to use.
Counts to ten.
And another ten.
One, two, three, four, five.
And the last one.
There you go. Now watch me slice this tomato.
It's sharp like a razor.
Vale.
So I'm going to slice it like this.
So I'm going to slice this tomato like this.
And I'm going to cut it off like that.
And then I'm going to slice the other side the same way.
And I'm going to cut it like that.
And that's how I'm going to do this.
Now, I'm going to slice this into two pieces.
